title: Anomie
description: ANOMIE is a tabletop world-building board game centered on structure, constraint, and emergence. The primary challenge was creating a visual system expansive enough to support open-ended narrative play while remaining cohesive. By extending Off-Type’s OB Brut, I developed a custom typographic and glyph system that functions as both language and interface—encoding rules, actions, and relationships within the game. The result is a modular identity that scales across components, reinforcing the systematic logic at the core of the gameplay.
